notes: canonical constitutive parthood
locational containment that v0.13 might confuse with parthood

text: Williamstown is part of Massachusetts and Asa lives in Williamstown
notes: disambiguation pair where both are true; one mereological + one spatial_temporal
preference + non-user agent → Layer 2 validator flags routing anomaly before LLM router runs (USER_SUBJECT_PATTERNS invariant)

novel (mereological, part_of) — LLM router fires, memo row written. Phase-2 corpus convention: memo entries are ordered, write-before-hit; future entries adding new (pattern, predicate) pairs respect that ordering

text: Berkshire County is part of Massachusetts
notes: same (mereological, part_of) shape as previous entry — memo hit, zero LLM calls, counts unchanged. Per principle 3, last_consulted_at bumps but affirmed_count stays 0
user-turn storage that the cheetahs-case assertion (next entry) consults via the predicate_equivalence oracle

the gate for Phase 3: assistant claim must resolve to MATCH against the prior dislikes fact via the oracle's contradictory + polarity-flip verdict. oracles_consulted is a list now; Phase 4 introduces multi-oracle paths (entity+predicate)

text_assistant: the paper was authored by Asa
notes: oracle classification target — Phase 3 ships the classification, Phase 4/7 wires consumption into Tier U so this case becomes a MATCH end-to-end
negative case gating against over-merging — likes vs loves differ in intensity; oracle MUST say distinct so Tier U falls through rather than wrong-matching
user-turn storage for the alias-resolution canonical case

text: you live in New York City
notes: the canonical Phase 4 case: alias identity (NYC vs New York City) resolves via entity_equivalence; literal predicate match on lives_in; no polarity flip
lowercase 'apple' refers to the fruit
case-disambiguation gate: 'apple' (fruit) and 'Apple' (company) are distinct entities; entity_equivalence must say different so Tier U falls through to MISS
stored Tokyo for the over-merge negative case

containment is not equivalence; entity_equivalence MUST say different (Tokyo and Japan are distinct entities even though Tokyo is part of Japan). Phase 5/7's entity_taxonomy + derivation walker will eventually MATCH this through part_of distribution; Phase 4 correctly MISSES. Phase 9's parity check should expect this entry's outcome to flip from miss to match after Phase 5+ ships
canonical is_a chain — substrate populates correctly. Phase 5 oracle is dormant; no tier_u consumption. expected_via stays null until Phase 7 wires the derivation walker that consumes this row
canonical part_of chain — anchors the future Phase 7 derivation walk for the Williamstown/Massachusetts case from the architecture doc. expected_via stays null until Phase 7 ships
the cheetahs-via-derivation case: liking animals propagates down to liking cheetahs through is_a chains. Phase 7 wires this into the walker. expected_via stays null until Phase 7 ships

text: let's say for this conversation I live in Berlin
notes: Phase 6 session-local storage. The marker phrase ('let's say' or 'for this conversation' — leftmost match) triggers session-local routing with session_ids=[A], is_session_local=1. affirmed_count=1: the assertion is the first independent evidence event under principle 3. The dispatcher should detect the marker_detected_phrase on the tier_u_storage event
Phase 6 in-session visibility positive. The session-local fact stored in p6-session-local-storage is visible from session A; literal SQL match returns MATCH without consulting oracles. via=[]

Phase 6 cross-session visibility negative. The session-A session-local fact is invisible from session B — the SQL filter strips it from the candidate set, no oracles are consulted, Tier U returns MISS. The 'recommendation #3' edge case: a different-session reassertion never produces a CHECK violation under correct visibility semantics
establishes the U fact for the Phase 7 Williamstown derivation case. Tier U stores cross-session (no session marker)

Phase 7 canonical derivation: Williamstown part_of Massachusetts + lives_in distributes_up part_of. Tier U misses; Tier W misses; derivation walks substrate (entity_taxonomy substitution Williamstown→Massachusetts gated by predicate_distribution=distributes_up) and matches the user's Williamstown fact in Tier U. Phase 8g rename: expected_walker_outcome=match + expected_served_from_tier=derivation supersede expected_tier_u_outcome here — the walker is the unified Layer-4 dispatcher, not Tier U specifically

establishes the U fact for Phase 7 cheetahs-via-derivation. Distinct from Phase 3's cheetahs storage (which stored at the specific cheetahs entity); this entry stores at the broader animals category to test compositional substrate consultations

Phase 7 cheetahs-via-derivation: extension of Phase 3's predicate_equivalence-only case. Three-oracle chain composes (likes/dislikes contradictory polarity flip) + (cheetah is_a animals via entity_taxonomy) + (preference dislikes p=1 distributes_down is_a). Phase 8g rename: walker outcome=match + served_from_tier=derivation

Phase 7 intentional MISS — no substrate rows mention Mars. The walker explores zero productive expansions in derivation and aborts with reason='exhausted'. Falls through to fresh which (without an LLM in tests) returns unverifiable_pending_implementation. Phase 8g rename: walker outcome=miss + served_from_tier=fresh. Layer 5 (Phase 8) hedges based on the status

Phase 7 intentional MISS — substrate has all rows needed but the predicate_distribution policy blocks propagation. predicate_distribution says 'neither' for (quantitative, weighs, p=1, is_a) and (quantitative, weighs, p=1, part_of) — weight is an individual property; it does not aggregate compositionally and does not inherit through category membership. Phase 8g rename: walker outcome=miss + served_from_tier=fresh

v0.14.6 regression: SHORT contrastive 'X, not Y' inputs were causing gpt-4.1-mini to flatten slot keys to the top level of the fact dict, the validator rejected with 'missing field slots', and the user's preference was silently lost. Fix: extractor prompt got an explicit STRUCTURAL CRITICAL note + a worked Contrastive corrections example. Smoke gate: must yield TWO preference facts, opposite polarities, both with slot keys properly nested under 'slots'.

text: Actually, I love ramen, not sushi
notes: v0.14.6 — the discourse-marker prefix 'Actually,' / 'Wait,' / 'Sorry,' must be treated as a correction cue, NOT an interrogative-meta abstain trigger. Same expected output as the no-prefix variant: two preference facts, opposite polarities.
